final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: packaging design showcase, commercial product photography
Primary request: premium organic matcha product line packaging suite display with four products
Scene/backdrop: light wood surface table, scattered fresh tea leaves and matcha powder as decorative accents
Subject: four matcha products (matcha powder, matcha chocolate, matcha cookies, matcha tea bags) arranged neatly in a row, each with elegant packaging
Style/medium: commercial product photography meets design mockup, Japanese minimalist aesthetic with modern design sensibility
Composition/framing: eye-level product lineup shot, shallow depth of field, clean arrangement
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, bright and fresh atmosphere, premium and elegant mood
Color palette: various shades of matcha green as primary, cream white and gold accents, natural wood tones
Materials/textures: matte paper packaging texture, delicate Japanese traditional pattern as subtle background texture, refined hand-drawn matcha tea garden illustration with clean elegant lines on each package
Text (verbatim): "中英日三语"
Constraints: maintain Japanese minimalist aesthetic throughout, preserve hand-drawn tea garden illustration style, ensure trilingual typography with serif and handwritten font combination
Avoid: plastic glossy finishes, cluttered composition, neon colors, cartoonish illustrations, busy patterns overwhelming the design
